---
title: "Yelp Case"
author: "Aanandi Yadav"
date: "2025-03-09"
output: html_document
---
# Load necessary libraries
library(readxl)
library(dplyr)

# Load the dataset
data <- read_excel("yelp.xlsx", sheet = "yelp_data")

# Compute Click-Through Rate (CTR) for each group
ctr_analysis <- data %>%
  group_by(Treatment) %>%
  summarise(
    total_ads = n(),
    total_clicks = sum(AdClick == "clicked"),
    CTR = total_clicks / total_ads
  )

print(ctr_analysis)

# Compute Sell-Through Rate (percentage of eligible ads shown)
sell_through_analysis <- data %>%
  group_by(Treatment) %>%
  summarise(
    total_eligible = sum(Eligible == "eligible"),
    total_shown = sum(AdShown == "shown"),
    Sell_Through_Rate = total_shown / total_eligible
  )

print(sell_through_analysis)

# Compute Conversion Rate per Impression
conversion_rate_analysis <- data %>%
  group_by(Treatment) %>%
  summarise(
    total_shown = sum(AdShown == "shown"),
    total_conversions = sum(AdClick == "clicked"),
    Conversion_Rate = total_conversions / total_shown
  )

print(conversion_rate_analysis)

# Compute Total Revenue Impact
revenue_analysis <- data %>%
  group_by(Treatment) %>%
  summarise(
    total_revenue = sum(Revenue)
  )

print(revenue_analysis)

# Conduct a t-test to check statistical significance of revenue difference
t_test_revenue <- t.test(Revenue ~ Treatment, data = data)
print(t_test_revenue)

library(ggplot2)

# Compute daily revenue per treatment group
daily_revenue <- data %>%
  group_by(Date, Treatment) %>%
  summarise(daily_revenue = sum(Revenue))

# Plot daily revenue trends
ggplot(daily_revenue, aes(x = Date, y = daily_revenue, color = Treatment)) +
  geom_line(size = 1) +
  labs(title = "Daily Revenue Trend by Treatment Group", x = "Date", y = "Revenue") +
  theme_minimal()
  
# Compute CTR by Device Type
ctr_device_analysis <- data %>%
  group_by(Treatment, Desktop) %>%
  summarise(
    total_ads = n(),
    total_clicks = sum(AdClick == "clicked"),
    CTR = total_clicks / total_ads
  )

print(ctr_device_analysis)

# Compute CTR by Local Service Type
ctr_local_service <- data %>%
  group_by(Treatment, LocalService) %>%
  summarise(
    total_ads = n(),
    total_clicks = sum(AdClick == "clicked"),
    CTR = total_clicks / total_ads
  )

print(ctr_local_service)

install.packages("pwr")  # Reminding Myself to Only Run this once!
library(pwr)

# CTR values from dataset
ctr_control <- 0.680  # CTR in control group
ctr_treatment <- 0.603  # CTR in treatment group
sample_size <- 87365  # Observations per group

# Compute effect size for proportions (Cohen's h)
effect_size_ctr <- ES.h(p1 = ctr_control, p2 = ctr_treatment)

# Power analysis for proportions
power_ctr <- pwr.2p.test(h = effect_size_ctr, n = sample_size, sig.level = 0.05, power = NULL)

# Print result
print(power_ctr)
